effects.effect: Target 1 Vivosaur you control; Deal 50 damage to it, and if you do, charge 1 Other FIRE Vivosaur from your Discard Pile.

effects.name: Tyrant to Be
effects.effect: If another [Tyranno] Vivosaur you control uses an Attack Skill: you can rest this Vivosaur; that Attack Skill deals x2 Damage.

effects.name: Great Unmasking
effects.effect: Place this card into your FP Zone; Play 1 "T-Rex" from your Hand or Deck.
